## Alternatives considered

## Spec / scope impact

- [ ] Requires new `references/*.md` (must be linked from `SKILL.md`).
- [ ] Requires new `scripts/*.py` (must ship tests).
- [ ] May change `SKILL.md` `description` (must stay ≤ 1024 chars).
- [ ] May change the body (must stay < 500 lines).
